creator: rink@FreeBSD.org
text:
How-To-Repeat:
	Areca makes fine RAID controllers, supported as arcmsr(4). Areca
	supplies a Command Line Interface tool, cli32, which can be used to
	query RAID status, create/update/destroy arrays etc.

	However, the location of this utility is not 100% obvious and
	tracking updates yourself can be boring.

Fix: Install this port, which installs the Areca CLI tool to a sensible
	location.
